wiki.summary: “Million Dollar Mansion” is the first track from the artist’s first 2026 project, serving as a follow-up to the REST IN BASS: ENCORE deluxe edition, and introducing a brand new sound. It is the first of two snippets released post the REST IN BASS era. The track showcases Che’s new and deeper vocal tone, as he raps about his new mansion, where the snippet video was also filmed. It was first previewed on Che’s Instagram and X accounts on March 18th, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “Million Dollar Mansion” is the first track from the artist’s first 2026 project, serving as a follow-up to the REST IN BASS: ENCORE deluxe edition, and introducing a brand new sound. It is the first of two snippets released post the REST IN BASS era. The track showcases Che’s new and deeper vocal tone, as he raps about his new mansion, where the snippet video was also filmed. It was first previewed on Che’s Instagram and X accounts on March 18th, 2026. The track was self-produced by Che, where he blends the common hard-hitting bass with a slightly lighter, less ominous melody. Che releases “Million Dollar Mansion” on March 27, 2026. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
